content.en:
Sunset Sect.

A large number of True Monarchs fell, and the land was almost soaked in blood, and the sky was filled with endless killing aura.

Everyone is afraid, after all, no one wants to die, and this time there are too many true monarchs who have died.

Any True Monarch placed in the chaos can dominate a Chaos Continent, or even a variety of Chaos Continents, in the eyes of countless beings in Chaos, the True Monarch is undoubtedly a real big man!

For example, the Tibetan God Organization that created the fusion of the two universes at the beginning, its supreme leader was only a true monarch, and it was also a relatively ordinary true monarch.

But now, the True Monarch here doesn't know how many have fallen.

A certain area of Luoyang Sect.

Thousands of True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall held each other, but no matter how many of them were, they were like ants in the eyes of the True Monarch of the Sunset Sect, and they were useless at all.

They are still alive now, and it is completely because the True Ancestors of the Sunset Sect have not killed here, otherwise one blow will be enough to completely wipe them out.

"Chenguang Zhenjun, what should we do?"

The other True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall looked at the Morning Light True Monarch.

Chenguang True Monarch was the most powerful True Monarch in their True Strength, and before the Four Transcendent Forces True Monarch did not enter the Quasi-Dao Realm, he was also ranked in the top 50 of the True Monarch List, and his strength improved rapidly.

It's a pity that the luck path is a little worse, and he has not been promoted to a half-step True Ancestor, but he is still far superior to other True Monarchs.

The other True Monarchs had no idea at all, and could only look forward to Yu Chenguang True Monarch.

However, Chenguang Zhenjun was also pale, and there was nothing he could do at all.

Even if he had infinite aura at this moment, instantly realized the Great Dao, condensed a complete Great Dao, and then promoted to a half-step True Ancestor, he would not be able to escape.

In his cognition, no matter how powerful a half-step true ancestor is, he is no match for these Sunset Sect True Ancestors, unless countless half-step True Ancestors besiege and kill these Sunset Sect True Ancestors.

But that's not realistic!

Rumble!!!!

A True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect suddenly killed the True Monarch of the Morning Light and them, and the unimaginable power of the True Ancestor descended, and the breath alone made it difficult for these True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall to move.

The Sunset Sect True Ancestor didn't look at the Morning Light True Monarch at all, he just slapped it with a giant palm of the Sun.

Perhaps in the eyes of this Sunset Sect True Ancestor, the Morning Light True Monarch is undoubtedly an ant, and they can be slapped to death at will, so they don't need to care about anything.

But just after the Sun Giant Palm descended, a sword light shattered the Sun Giant Palm.

I saw a figure appear above the heads of Chenguang Zhenjun and the others.

Looking at this figure, Chenguang Zhenjun immediately said respectfully: "Thank you Wanfa Daozi!"

A famous true monarch shouted Wanfa Daozi and was grateful.

They were very surprised that at this time, Ye Tian actually came to rescue them.

Moreover, Ye Tian actually blocked the blow of the Sunset Sect True Ancestor, which was simply incredible.

"Don't resist!"

Ye Tian sent a message to Chenguang Zhenjun and others.

In an instant, with a swipe of the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, he directly collected Chenguang Zhenjun and the others into the inner universe.

Ye Tian also happened to see Chenguang Zhenjun and the others, in the spirit that they were also members of the Void Heaven Palace, if they could save it, they naturally wanted to save it.

"Hey, a true monarch actually blocked my blow, you are definitely the most demonic true monarch in this realm, then killing you is more cost-effective than killing millions of true monarchs. With a true monarch like you buried with me, I won't die in vain!"

The True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect laughed and said.

He hated true geniuses, although he was also very strong in the Sunset Sect, he was the best among the true disciples, otherwise he would not have been saved by the Dao Ancestors and lived to this realm.

But this time, the geniuses of the Sunset Sect's true demons, or those few disciples of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, were not awakened, and the Sunset Sect sacrificed them, not those true ancestors of the true ancestors.

So, he was not convinced!

The Sunset Sect's mid-stage, late-stage, and peak True Ancestors of the Great Dao can't be born at the moment, they don't mind, but there are far more than thirty True Ancestors who are still sleeping in the early stage of the Great Dao.

Why, they must wake up and sacrifice.

It's not because their talent is not as good as other True Ancestors, so he hates a genius like Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's talent is probably far beyond the strongest genius of their Sunset Sect, and he will be extremely happy to torture and kill such a genius!

"Die!"

"Anode Sword!"

An Origin Sword that was completely condensed by the power of the True Ancestor and the rules of the Great Dao of Yang slashed towards Ye Tian with terrifying might.

This is a high-grade Origin Divine Power created by this True Ancestor, and it is extremely powerful, and then it is used by him, the True Ancestor, almost all the power of this Origin Divine Power can be displayed.

Facing the anode sword, Ye Tian was unprecedentedly dignified.

Compared to this True Ancestor, those Dao Ancestor incarnations he had encountered before were undoubtedly ants, which was simply too weak.

"Blood River True Body!"

"Three-in-one, incarnate physical power!"

"Black Wind Realm Technique!"

A door method was used by Ye Tian, and a piece of defensive half-way weapons was also stimulated by Ye Tian.

Burst!!!

Under the anode sword, Ye Tian's defense method was pierced, and his body was also pierced.

This time, Ye Tian was injured.

"Run!"

Ye Tian used the space-time shifting technique to keep shuttling, but here in the Sunset Sect, the distance of shuttling was too short.

"If you want to leave, let me die!"

This true ancestor of the Sunset Sect went crazy and used one of his own strange things.

This strange thing is a small sword, originally a piece of wood, which was refined into this small sword by the Dao Ancestor of the sect, which contains the power of the Dao Ancestor, and with his strength, one blow can burst out with nearly ten times the attack power.

The anode sword he had just used had injured Ye Tian, and the full force of the strange thing was enough to kill Ye Tian.

Distance.

Ye Tian trembled, as if he felt a real terror, and the aura of death completely enveloped him.

He noticed that the True Ancestor had taken out a strange object, which gave him a feeling that once he was hit by this strange object, he would definitely die, and any life-saving treasure would be useless.

In the past, he had also obtained many life-saving treasures, treasures that replaced death, completely defended, and weakened attacks, but he felt that these treasures could not stop this small sword artifact.

In the face of true power, some life-saving things are completely useless.

I saw that the True Ancestor had inspired the little sword artifact, and the little sword turned into a sword of death and stabbed at Ye Tian.

This moment.

Ye Tian didn't use any means to save his life, but took out a jade coffin, which was the cold jade coffin he had obtained in a secret room with the Yunzi Divine Maiden.

This cold jade coffin is of a peculiar material, even if he is many times stronger now, he can't help the cold jade coffin at all.

According to his speculation, non-Dao Ancestors could not help this cold jade coffin.

And no matter how powerful the true ancestor of the Sunset Sect was, he would definitely not be able to break the cold jade coffin.

The sword of death stabbed, and Ye Tian held the cold jade coffin in front of him.

Rumble!!!!

The sword of death slammed into the cold jade coffin, and the terrifying impact directly flew Ye Tianzhen out, if he hadn't held the cold jade coffin tightly, I'm afraid that even the cold jade coffin wouldn't know where the impact was.

"Survived!"

Ye Tian knelt down in the void, his body was torn apart, this was shocked by the terrifying impact, although he was very embarrassed, but the injury was not serious.

Just at such a price, he blocked the strange thing of the little sword, which shows how powerful the cold jade coffin is.

If the previous owner of the cold jade coffin knew that Ye Tian used the cold jade coffin to resist the attack, I am afraid that he would be so angry that he would kill Ye Tian.
